message:
feat: add f32 session API and fix autograd dispatch to properly convert f32 tensors

Session API (ft-api):
- tensor_variable_f32, tensor_values_f32, tensor_dtype for f32 creation
  and inspection
- tensor_to_f32/tensor_to_f64 cast operations
- Factory functions: zeros_f32, ones_f32, randn_f32
- Tests: f32 variable creation, factory fns, arithmetic preserving
  dtype, mixed f32+f64 promotion to f64, cast roundtrip, backward

Autograd dispatch fixes (ft-autograd):
- Systematically fix ~40 operations to use contiguous_values_as_f64()
  instead of raw storage() access, ensuring f32 tensors are correctly
  promoted when flowing through the f64 dispatch layer
- Affected: trace, pow, clamp, sum, mean, all dim-reduction ops,
  softmax/log_softmax, argmax/argmin, index_select, gather, scatter,
  masked_fill, where, sort, topk, cat, stack, reshape, transpose,
  permute, expand, narrow, flip, repeat, chunk, lerp, addmm, addmv,
  and backward norm gradient

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
